CREATE TABLE test_struct (data STRUCT<a: INT, b: INT>);
CREATE TABLE nested_test (info STRUCT<name: STRING>, details STRUCT<age: INT>);
SELECT struct_insert(info, city := 'New York') FROM nested_test;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (id INT, data STRUCT<a: INT, b: STRING>);
SELECT struct_insert(data, c := 'world') FROM multi_table_test WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE complex_test (comp STRUCT<name: STRING, attributes: STRUCT<height: INT, weight: INT>>);
CREATE TABLE join_test (id INT, data STRUCT<value: INT>);
CREATE TABLE secondary_test (key INT, info STRUCT<data: STRING>);
SELECT struct_insert(j.data, extra := 200) FROM join_test j JOIN secondary_test s ON j.id = s.key;
SELECT struct_insert(STRUCT('a', 1), b := 2, c := 3) AS new_struct;
